name: TwinCitiesGolf.com
address: 574 Prairie Center Dr # 135, Eden Prairie, MN 55344
about: TwinCitiesGolf.com is a comprehensive golf resource and community hub established in 1998, serving over 60,000 golfers in Minnesota and Western Wisconsin. The organization manages a network of 150+ golf courses and provides services including event hosting, USGA handicap administration, and tee time booking. It operates a Public Country Club membership program for $65/month, offering unlimited golf access and discounts at indoor simulators. The venue facilitates both outdoor seasonal golf events and year-round indoor competitions, primarily focused on scrambles and individual tournaments.
why_golfers_like_it: Extensive network of 150+ courses with unlimited access through membership
Year-round competitive events with structured payout systems
USGA GHIN handicap services for official scoring
Indoor simulator facilities for winter play
Comprehensive course directory with integrated tee time booking

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining options available at partner clubhouses and event venues
Available at partner clubhouses and event venues

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the website mentions club fitting options, it doesn't explicitly state if rental clubs are available. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for club rental information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and beverage options are available at partner clubhouses and event venues. Specific BYOB policies aren't detailed on the website.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For traditional golf courses, 18 holes typically take 4-5 hours. Indoor simulator time isn't specified, but events are typically scrambles which play faster than stroke play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers family-friendly events and has programs suitable for all skill levels, making it accessible for junior golfers and families.
